parameters.query:
insert into classification_shortlist (
  product_id,
  product_raw_id,
  product_type_guess,
  rule_top_category_id,
  rule_top_score,
  shortlist_count,
  shortlist_json,
  combined_text,
  rules_version
) values (
  $1,
  $2,
  $3,
  $4,
  $5,
  $6,
  $7::jsonb,
  $8,
  $9
)
on conflict (product_id) do update set
  product_raw_id       = excluded.product_raw_id,
  product_type_guess   = excluded.product_type_guess,
  rule_top_category_id = excluded.rule_top_category_id,
  rule_top_score       = excluded.rule_top_score,
  shortlist_count      = excluded.shortlist_count,
  shortlist_json       = excluded.shortlist_json,
  combined_text        = excluded.combined_text,
  rules_version        = excluded.rules_version,
  updated_at           = now()
returning
  id as shortlist_id,
  product_id,
  product_raw_id,
  product_type_guess,
  rule_top_category_id,
  rule_top_score,
  shortlist_count,
  combined_text;

insert into product_classification (
  product_id,
  product_raw_id,
  rule_top_category_id,
  rule_top_score,
  rule_shortlist_id,
  rule_decision_status,
  decision_status,
  final_source
) values (
  $1,
  $2,
  $3,
  cast($4 as numeric)::integer,
  $5,
  case
    when cast($4 as numeric)::integer >= 20 then 'accepted_candidate'
    when cast($4 as numeric)::integer >= 10 then 'needs_llm'
    when $6 = 0 then 'no_match'
    else 'needs_llm'
  end,
  'pending',
  'pending'
)
on conflict (product_id) do update set
  product_raw_id       = excluded.product_raw_id,
  rule_top_category_id = excluded.rule_top_category_id,
  rule_top_score       = excluded.rule_top_score,
  rule_shortlist_id    = excluded.rule_shortlist_id,
  rule_decision_status = excluded.rule_decision_status,
  updated_at           = now()
returning
  product_id,
  product_raw_id,
  rule_top_category_id,
  rule_top_score,
  rule_shortlist_id,
  rule_decision_status,
  decision_status,
  final_source;

options.queryReplacement:
={{ [
  Number($json.product_id),
  Number($json.product_raw_id),
  $json.rule_top_category_id ? Number($json.rule_top_category_id) : null,
  Number($json.rule_top_score ?? 0),
  Number($json.shortlist_id),
  Number($json.shortlist_count ?? 0)
] }}

parameters.query:
insert into product_classification_log (
  product_id,
  stage,
  actor_type,
  actor_name,
  status,
  input_payload,
  output_payload,
  selected_category_id,
  confidence,
  explanation,
  validation_passed,
  workflow_version,
  prompt_version
) values (
  $1,
  'rule_shortlist',
  'system',
  'rule_engine_v1',
  'success',
  $2::jsonb,
  $3::jsonb,
  $4,
  $5,
  $6,
  true,
  'v1.0.0',
  null
)
returning id, product_id, stage, selected_category_id, confidence;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [   Number($json.product_id),   JSON.stringify({     product_raw_id: $json.product_raw_id,     combined_text: $json.combined_text,     product_type_guess: $json.product_type_guess   }),   JSON.stringify({     shortlist_id: $json.shortlist_id,     rule_top_category_id: $json.rule_top_category_id,     rule_top_score: $json.rule_top_score,     shortlist_count: $json.shortlist_count   }),   $json.rule_top_category_id ? Number($json.rule_top_category_id) : null,   Math.max(0, Math.min(1, Number($json.rule_top_score || 0) / 20)),   'Rule-based shortlist generated' ] }}
